items.caption: A four-panel comic strip featuring batman. in the first panel, batman is holding a green dollar bill with a portrait of abraham lincoln. the text reads, "just as i expected: counterfeit." in the second panel, batman is holding a green dollar bill with a portrait of abraham lincoln. the text reads, "hmm... a masterpiece of duplication, except for one tiny slip-up." in the third panel, batman is holding a green dollar bill with a portrait of abraham lincoln. the text reads, "president lincoln never wore a turtle neck sweater." in the fourth panel, batman is holding a green dollar bill with a portrait of abraham lincoln. the text reads, "robin: what's that, batman?" the background is a simple, cartoonish depiction of a room with a window.
